title: Samsung’s Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 bet big on battery
summary: With the new Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, which are being announced today, Samsung is more or less taking what people like about its watches and tweaking those elements to be better.
